headings.rules: tracking-tight for H1/H2. Never center by default. Use fluid scales maxing at text-6xl for hero.

body.rules: leading-relaxed for body text. Use text-base for standard paragraphs.

spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Bento 'Tetris' Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Leave empty cells for offset alignment.
spacing_and_layout.admin_grid: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 to gap-6). Use h-full so widgets stretch.
spacing_and_layout.generous_padding: Use p-8, p-12, p-16, p-24 for marketing sections to provide breathing room.

components.marketing_surfaces: Pure HTML/Tailwind. Flat backgrounds using 'surface' color (#EBE4D8), 1px solid border (#D3CEC4), no default shadow. Sharp or 8px rounded corners.
components.admin_surfaces: Use Shadcn components, customized to remove vercel-look. Solid backgrounds, border-collapse layouts.
components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F4EFEA]/80, 1px bottom border border-[#2C4C3B]/10. Must ensure nav links are high contrast.
components.footer: Contrast Shift: Deep Forest Green (#2C4C3B) background with Warm Sand (#F4EFEA) text. Massive padding py-24.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: ALWAYS set explicit hover text and bg colors (e.g., hover:bg-[#20382B] hover:text-[#F4EFEA]). Marketing cards get a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg on hover.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: High contrast focus rings: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#B84A2E] focus:outline-none.
interactions_and_motion.animation: Use framer-motion for staggered entrances of tour grids. Use lenis for momentum scrolling on the marketing site.

icons.style: duotone or regular weight, scaling cleanly to match text size.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='tour-book-button').

hero.description: Person on top of a mountain surrounded by clouds. Use with bg-[#1B241D]/30 overlay to ensure text contrast.

tours.description: Man hiking on rocky mountain trail. Use for Alpine / Mountain Trek tour.
Waterfall in a forest. Use for Canyon / Forest River tour.
Group of hikers trekking. Use for Group Expedition tour.

about_image.description: Woman standing on rock formation during daytime.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load fonts from Google Fonts: Outfit (headings) and Manrope (body).
Install framer-motion and lenis for smooth scrolling and animations on the marketing site.
Do not use generic 'card' component wrappers from Shadcn for the marketing pages; use pure HTML/Tailwind divs with the defined 'surface' color and 1px border. Shadcn is for Admin forms/tables/modals.
Admin dashboard must use a dense grid layout with strict functional colors. Admin sidebar should be dark text_primary (#1B241D) with white text.
Tour detail page must have a large immersive header with max-overlay opacity of bg-black/40.
Forms in both the booking request and admin panel must use customized Shadcn components matching the earthy theme.
